subcodes.first_line: O noble personage! The letter of the twenty-fourth of November, 1920, hath been received. Praise be unto God, the light of truth hath shone forth and vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص جلیل نامه بیست و چهارم نومبر ۱۹۲۰ رسید الحمد لله نور حقیقت درخشید و بصر
subcodes.subjects: @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
